  "i18n_en": {
    "多头引用的多哈会谈、国会简报等证据本身也显示双方对已签协议内容各说各话、尚未触及核查等核心分歧，更宽松的12月31日了结市场都仅45.5%，8月31日更紧迫的窗口内完成难度更大。价格深度高、参与广泛、成交量放量，可作强锚，与证据方向一致，二者相互印证支持NO；社媒热度不改变基本面判断。 这一注押 No，顺 edge。": "The evidence cited by the bulls—such as the Doha talks and congressional briefings—itself shows both sides giving conflicting accounts of the content of the already-signed agreement, with core disagreements over verification not yet addressed; even the looser December 31 resolution market shows only 45.5%, making the more urgent August 31 window even harder to meet. High price depth, broad participation, and volume surge serve as a strong anchor consistent with the evidence direction, mutually reinforcing support for NO; social media buzz does not change the fundamental judgment. This bet goes with NO, following the edge.",
    "美伊能否在53天内就核查条款等关键分歧达成一致，将临时谅解备忘录升级为具有法律约束力的最终协议": "Whether the US and Iran can resolve key disagreements such as verification clauses within 53 days to upgrade the interim memorandum of understanding into a legally binding final agreement"
  }
}
